name: 非文学文本
subject: english
domain_name: 读者-作者-文本 / Readers, Writers, Texts / Readers, Writers, Texts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to apply principles of textual analysis to a range of non-literary text types (e.g., advertisements, opinion columns, speeches, infographics), identifying their purpose, audience, and contextual constraints.
Students will be able to deconstruct the use of visual and linguistic design elements in non-literary texts to understand how they construct meaning and position the audience.
